item.title: The Search for Ashley Doolittle and Tanner Flores
item.description:
Ashley Doolittle and Tanner Flores were reported missing after the couple unexpectedly stopped communicating with family and friends during a trip. Their disappearance quickly sparked concern as authorities worked to trace their last known movements.
Investigators searched multiple locations and reviewed digital evidence, surveillance footage, and witness statements to piece together a timeline. Family members publicly pleaded for information as the case gained attention online and in local media.
The search for Ashley and Tanner remains ongoing, with authorities continuing to ask the public for tips. The case has raised questions about what happened to the couple and whether foul play was involved.

media:content.media:title: The Search for Ashley Doolittle and Tanner Flores
media:content.media:description:
Ashley Doolittle and Tanner Flores were reported missing after the couple unexpectedly stopped communicating with family and friends during a trip. Their disappearance quickly sparked concern as authorities worked to trace their last known movements.
Investigators searched multiple locations and reviewed digital evidence, surveillance footage, and witness statements to piece together a timeline. Family members publicly pleaded for information as the case gained attention online and in local media.
The search for Ashley and Tanner remains ongoing, with authorities continuing to ask the public for tips. The case has raised questions about what happened to the couple and whether foul play was involved.

item.title: The Kaylee Sawyer Case: Who's Responsible?
item.description:
In July 2016, 23 year old Kaylee Sawyer disappeared after leaving a party in Bend, Oregon. Hours later, investigators discovered her body in a remote area, launching a major investigation that shocked the local community.
Authorities arrested Edwin Lara, a campus security officer, after evidence linked him to the case. Prosecutors said he used his position and vehicle to gain Kaylee’s trust before abducting her.
Lara later pleaded guilty and received life in prison. The case sparked widespread discussion about hiring practices, background checks, and safety concerns surrounding private security personnel.

media:content.media:title: The Kaylee Sawyer Case: Who's Responsible?
media:content.media:description:
In July 2016, 23 year old Kaylee Sawyer disappeared after leaving a party in Bend, Oregon. Hours later, investigators discovered her body in a remote area, launching a major investigation that shocked the local community.
Authorities arrested Edwin Lara, a campus security officer, after evidence linked him to the case. Prosecutors said he used his position and vehicle to gain Kaylee’s trust before abducting her.
Lara later pleaded guilty and received life in prison. The case sparked widespread discussion about hiring practices, background checks, and safety concerns surrounding private security personnel.

item.title: Who Was Involved In Alexis Sharkey’s Disappearance?
item.description:
In November 2020, Houston influencer Alexis Sharkey was found dead near a roadside days after being reported missing. Authorities said the 26 year old had suffered injuries consistent with foul play, leading to a homicide investigation.
Investigators later focused on her husband, Tom Sharkey, after reviewing evidence and statements connected to the case. Before charges could proceed, he was found dead from a self inflicted gunshot wound in Florida.
Officials stated they believed Tom Sharkey was responsible for Alexis’s death. The case drew widespread attention due to Alexis’s social media presence and the unanswered questions surrounding her final days.

media:content.media:title: Who Was Involved In Alexis Sharkey’s Disappearance?
media:content.media:description:
In November 2020, Houston influencer Alexis Sharkey was found dead near a roadside days after being reported missing. Authorities said the 26 year old had suffered injuries consistent with foul play, leading to a homicide investigation.
Investigators later focused on her husband, Tom Sharkey, after reviewing evidence and statements connected to the case. Before charges could proceed, he was found dead from a self inflicted gunshot wound in Florida.
Officials stated they believed Tom Sharkey was responsible for Alexis’s death. The case drew widespread attention due to Alexis’s social media presence and the unanswered questions surrounding her final days.

item.title: The Case of Eric Richins
item.description:
In 2022, Utah man Eric Richins died suddenly at his home after what was initially believed to be a medical emergency. Authorities later determined he had ingested a fatal amount of fentanyl, leading investigators to open a homicide case.
Police accused his wife, Kouri Richins, of poisoning him after uncovering evidence involving financial issues, life insurance policies, and changes Eric had made to his will before his death. Investigators also examined digital searches and communications connected to the case.
The story gained national attention after Kouri published a children’s grief book following Eric’s death. She has denied the allegations, and the criminal case remains ongoing.

media:content.media:title: The Case of Eric Richins
media:content.media:description:
In 2022, Utah man Eric Richins died suddenly at his home after what was initially believed to be a medical emergency. Authorities later determined he had ingested a fatal amount of fentanyl, leading investigators to open a homicide case.
Police accused his wife, Kouri Richins, of poisoning him after uncovering evidence involving financial issues, life insurance policies, and changes Eric had made to his will before his death. Investigators also examined digital searches and communications connected to the case.
The story gained national attention after Kouri published a children’s grief book following Eric’s death. She has denied the allegations, and the criminal case remains ongoing.

item.title: Lisa Au: Still Unsolved, And Her Family Needs Closure
item.description:
1982, 19 year old Lisa Au disappeared after leaving her home in Honolulu, Hawaii. She was last seen driving to work, but never arrived, prompting concern from family members and investigators.
Weeks later, her vehicle was discovered abandoned, but there was no sign of Lisa. Authorities pursued multiple leads over the years, though no arrests were ever made and the circumstances surrounding her disappearance remain unclear.
More than four decades later, the case remains unsolved. Lisa’s family continues to seek answers and hopes renewed attention could finally bring closure to one of Hawaii’s long running missing person investigations.

media:content.media:title: Lisa Au: Still Unsolved, And Her Family Needs Closure
media:content.media:description:
1982, 19 year old Lisa Au disappeared after leaving her home in Honolulu, Hawaii. She was last seen driving to work, but never arrived, prompting concern from family members and investigators.
Weeks later, her vehicle was discovered abandoned, but there was no sign of Lisa. Authorities pursued multiple leads over the years, though no arrests were ever made and the circumstances surrounding her disappearance remain unclear.
More than four decades later, the case remains unsolved. Lisa’s family continues to seek answers and hopes renewed attention could finally bring closure to one of Hawaii’s long running missing person investigations.
